original_snippet_context: Presidential decrees related to various government appointments.
relevant_quote: Nomeando para a caixa de conversão : Vice-presidente, o Dr. Henrique de Oliveira Baltar; thesoureiro, o bacharel João Gomes Rebello Horta ; thesoureiro interino, o thesoureiro geral do Thesouro Federal Dr. Carlos Claudio da Silva
justification: This mentions appointments to positions within the Caixa de Conversão, providing factual information without expressing an opinion on its merits or the conversion rate.
